'''âng-l-n-t''' ('''kangalnetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:electrosilver|electrosilver]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-l-n-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:electrosilver|electrosilver]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-l-n-t
|-
! Lemma
| kangalnetoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingalnetoko|thingalnetoko]] || [[word:jingalnetoko|jingalnetoko]] || [[word:shingalnetoko|shingalnetoko]] || [[word:kingalnetoko|kingalnetoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|}
